headline: Musk announces Terafab chip plant in Austin for AI and robotics
summary: Elon Musk is building a massive chip fabrication plant in Texas to produce chips at scale for robotics, AI, and space-based data centers.

headline: Meta's Zuckerberg reportedly building AI CEO agent to help run the company
summary: According to the Wall Street Journal, Mark Zuckerberg is developing an AI agent to assist with CEO responsibilities at Meta.

headline: Trump Administration releases National Policy Framework on Artificial Intelligence
summary: The White House released a legislative blueprint for national AI policy on March 20, 2026, establishing framework for regulation and development.

headline: Study finds AI can make humans more creative
summary: New research from Swansea University suggests AI acts as a creative collaborator rather than just replacing human work.

headline: Pentagon adopts Palantir's Maven AI as core US military system
summary: Palantir's Maven AI system becomes an official program of record, locking in long-term use of its weapons-targeting technology across the US military.

headline: OpenAI releases GPT-5.4 mini and nano with near-flagship performance
summary: OpenAI launched smaller, faster models designed for low-latency applications like coding assistants and subagents at much lower cost.

headline: Anthropic launches Claude Code Channels for Discord and Telegram
summary: Anthropic announced Claude Code Channels, allowing users to message Claude Code directly through Discord and Telegram messaging apps.

headline: Anthropic's Claude gains market share as business subscriptions grow 4.9%
summary: Anthropic saw business software subscriptions grow while OpenAI's share fell 1.5% in February, according to Ramp data.

headline: Google expands Gemini features across Workspace apps
summary: Gemini now helps users write documents, create spreadsheets, and design presentations faster in Docs, Sheets, Slides and Drive.

headline: Microsoft rolls back Copilot AI entry points in Windows 11
summary: Microsoft announced changes to reduce the number of Copilot entry points in Windows 11, dialing back AI assistant integration.

headline: NVIDIA sees $1 trillion AI chip revenue opportunity through 2027
summary: Nvidia outlined strategy for AI inference chips with projected revenue opportunity reaching at least $1 trillion by 2027.
